notes.completion_rate: Perfect 100% delivery against scope — exceptional quarter execution.
notes.releases_shipped: 16 releases shipped across 7 sprints (2.3 avg per sprint) — strong, consistent deployment cadence.
notes.oos_total: Zero out-of-sprint additions — disciplined sprint planning with no scope creep.
notes.oos_open: No open OOS items — all planned work delivered as scoped.
notes.type_split: Balanced portfolio: 49% tasks, 26% stories, 25% bugs — bug ratio is healthy and within normal range.
notes.avg_releases: Median 2 releases per sprint (mean 2.3) indicates consistent, predictable release rhythm.
notes.time_logged: Only 17 hours logged against 1,251 estimated — critical time tracking gap undermines capacity planning and estimate validation.
notes.estimate_accuracy: Cannot assess accuracy with 99% variance and near-zero logging — estimation process exists but verification is absent.
notes.no_estimate: 69% of tickets (135) had no estimate — planning data is unreliable and limits predictability for future quarters.
notes.rollover: Zero rollover — every sprint commitment was honoured with no carryover debt.
notes.cycle_time: Median 13 days (mean 24.4) — some long-running outliers inflate average, but median shows reasonable flow for most tickets.
notes.assignee_workload: Riccardo Fachin carried 21% of total load (41 tickets) — relatively even distribution across 12 contributors with no severe concentration risk.
